mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month growth in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and near-term revenue momentum for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS vintage value for 2017-02-01 was 473991.0 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth has nonpositive Rank IC with 20-day S&P 500 forward returns over two consecutive 3-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate increase of at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months tightens discount rates and financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS vintage value for 2017-02-01 was 0.66 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion combined with a falling unemployment rate signals broad labor-income growth without labor-market deterioration, raising expected earnings and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS vintage value for 2017-02-01 was 145798.0 and UNRATE vintage value was 4.7
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with still-positive job creation
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-falling state has lower 60-day forward returns than states without the interaction in a walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in industrial production over 3 months signals weakening real activity and operating leverage pressure in cyclical sectors, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO vintage value for 2017-01-01 was 104.5548 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO contraction triggers have a nonnegative average excess 20-day S&P 500 return versus non-triggered observations across the full walk-forward sample.

mechanism_narrative: A large year-over-year decline in housing starts signals weaker construction demand and reduced household durables activity, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST vintage value for 2017-01-01 was 1246.0 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if the triggered HOUST decline state does not reduce 60-day S&P 500 hit rate below the unconditional positive-return frequency by at least 5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices while the federal funds rate remains below inflation signals negative real policy rates and future tightening risk, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change > 3% and FEDFUNDS < CPIAUCSL year-over-year percent change
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL vintage value for 2017-02-01 was 244.456 and FEDFUNDS vintage value was 0.66
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term between CPIAUCSL inflation acceleration and low FEDFUNDS has positive or zero predictive coefficient for 20-day returns in rolling out-of-sample regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate of at least 0.3 percentage points signals labor-market deterioration and recession-risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE vintage value for 2017-02-01 was 4.7 as of the decision snapshot
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE rise triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns at least as often as the unconditional baseline and have no negative mean-return differential.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with positive real GDP growth signals synchronized real activity expansion, improving earnings breadth and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change > 0 and GDPC1 latest quarterly change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 vintage value for 2016-10-01 was 16804.1 and INDPRO vintage value for 2017-01-01 was 104.5548
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-positive and GDPC1-positive state has zero or negative average 5-day S&P 500 forward returns in at least two consecutive walk-forward evaluation windows.
